description: This Java class 'DashboardService' provides logic to generate dashboard metrics related to defects and corrective actions, including counts of total defects, open defects, overdue actions, and distributions by severity and status.

classes.name: DashboardService
classes.description: Service class responsible for aggregating defect and corrective action data to produce dashboard metrics.

methods.name: getDashboard
methods.description: Fetches all defects and actions, categorizes them by severity and status, counts open and overdue items, and returns a dashboard response object.
